title: Smoky Tender Hunan Corned Beef Bao
description: A twist on traditional Chinese bao featuring smoky corned beef, pickled vegetables, and a hint of spicy Hunan sauce. This recipe is perfect for a low-calorie meal prep.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine corned beef, low-sodium soy sauce, Hunan sauce, sesame oil, ginger paste, and garlic paste. Mix well to combine.
Wrap the mixture in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Cook the pickled carrots and green onions in the grill or grill pan for 2-3 minutes or until slightly charred.
Warm the soft bao buns in the oven at 350°F (180°C) for 5-7 minutes.
Assemble the bao by spreading a spoonful of the corned beef mixture onto each bun, followed by a few slices of pickled carrots and green onions.
Top with cilantro leaves and serve immediately.
